attributes.additional_details: Kier Starmer has lost all credibility as a Prime Minister. This has been reflected in the latest elections. Labour stated they would be the party of integrity but there have been many scandals and examples of cronyism. The electorate was promised that taxes wouldn't be raised and they were. The Prime Minister has made many U turns on his pledges. He has also failed regarding the Grooming Gang Inquiries. The NHS is failing and the gangs haven't been smashed. Call a general now.
attributes.background: Parliament to debate calling for a general election

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Dissolve Parliament and call a General Election now!
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/750050
